violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the (bakers racks, prep table shelves, oven,counters ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The floors in back kitchen, front counter, and storage rooms have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the on top of food product in storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (0) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (200-400) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the bakers racks have an accumulation of food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024

The floors in walk in coolers, floors under storage racks in back storage area, floors under behind equipment throughout establishment have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/08/2024
